actionUnits.condition: LeftHand Controller has SphereCollider (fileID 235308788, isTrigger=1) and MonoBehaviour (fileID 235308790) configured from script guid 4a8d337e8bc7ac4498e0df29e7b8bd5e (OnButtonPress). InputAction is bound to <XRController>{LeftHand}/primaryButton. Scene meta m_Calls: OnPress -> ToggleRay(fileID 172617727).ActivateRay(); OnRelease -> ToggleRay(fileID 172617727).DeactivateRay(). Trigger these no-arg MonoBehaviour methods to simulate press and release to cover both UnityEvent paths.

RightHand Controller has SphereCollider (fileID 474225664, isTrigger=1) and MonoBehaviour (fileID 474225666) configured from script guid 4a8d337e8bc7ac4498e0df29e7b8bd5e (OnButtonPress). InputAction bound to <XRController>{RightHand}/primaryButton. Scene meta m_Calls: OnPress -> ToggleRay(fileID 1287520551).ActivateRay(); OnRelease -> ToggleRay(fileID 1287520551).DeactivateRay(). Manually triggering these no-arg methods covers both UnityEvent paths.

MonoBehaviour component (fileID 172617727) is the serialized settings of the attached script ToggleRay (m_Script fileID 11500000, guid cf14522d53cc1594991c164e785780dc) on LeftHand Ray Controller. Serialized fields: forceToggle=0, directInteractor=fileID 235308789. To ensure ActivateRay toggles, the directInteractor must have no valid targets (TouchingObject() == false). This test manually triggers the public no-parameter methods ActivateRay and DeactivateRay to cover the switching logic (rayInteractor.enabled and directInteractor.enabled).

MonoBehaviour component (fileID 1287520551) is the serialized settings of the attached script ToggleRay (m_Script fileID 11500000, guid cf14522d53cc1594991c164e785780dc) on RightHand Ray Controller. Serialized fields: forceToggle=0, directInteractor=fileID 474225665. Awake() already executed at runtime to set rayInteractor.enabled=false via SwitchInteractors(false). Ensure XRDirectInteractor (fileID 474225665) has no valid targets at trigger time so ActivateRay toggles on (TouchingObject()==false).
